assertionResults.fullName: AffiliatesService rejects affiliate applications for users without approved KYC
assertionResults.title: rejects affiliate applications for users without approved KYC

assertionResults.fullName: TreasuryService calculates the treasury summary totals
assertionResults.title: calculates the treasury summary totals

assertionResults.fullName: TreasuryService derives reconciliation status from balance and warning state
assertionResults.title: derives reconciliation status from balance and warning state

assertionResults.fullName: TreasuryService returns a no snapshot warning when no treasury balance exists
assertionResults.title: returns a no snapshot warning when no treasury balance exists

assertionResults.fullName: TreasuryService warns when liabilities exceed treasury
assertionResults.title: warns when liabilities exceed treasury

assertionResults.fullName: PermissionsGuard throws when the authenticated user is missing permissions
assertionResults.title: throws when the authenticated user is missing permissions

assertionResults.fullName: RebatesService calculates affiliate rebate from broker revenue
assertionResults.title: calculates affiliate rebate from broker revenue

assertionResults.fullName: RebatesService calculates gross and net broker revenue
assertionResults.title: calculates gross and net broker revenue

assertionResults.fullName: SurveillanceService flags repeated rejected orders
assertionResults.title: flags repeated rejected orders
